# Corporate Style — Word Template Specs

## Typography
- Heading font: Calibri, Bold
- Body font: Calibri, Regular
- Title: 26pt, color #1F4E79
- Heading 1: 18pt, color #1F4E79, bold
- Heading 2: 14pt, color #2E75B6, bold
- Heading 3: 12pt, color #2E75B6, bold italic
- Body: 11pt, color #333333
- Line spacing: 1.15

## Colors
- Primary: #1F4E79 (dark blue)
- Accent: #2E75B6 (medium blue)
- Light accent: #D6E4F0 (light blue, table headers)
- Text: #333333
- Border: #B4C7E0

## Heading Style
- Left border: 3pt solid #1F4E79 (Heading 1 only)
- Space before: 18pt (H1), 12pt (H2), 8pt (H3)
- Space after: 6pt all levels

## Table Style
- Header row: background #1F4E79, white text, bold
- Alternating rows: #F2F7FB / white
- Border: 0.5pt #B4C7E0
- Cell padding: 80 DXA top/bottom, 120 DXA left/right

## Header / Footer
- Header: Company name left, date right (10pt, gray)
- Footer: Page X of Y, centered (9pt, gray)
- Thin blue line separator (#2E75B6)

## Page Setup
- A4 (8.27" × 11.69")
- Margins: 1" all sides
- Content width: 6.27" (9,026 DXA)
